7: Context Engineering (see Fig.1) is the systematic discipline of designing, constructing,
8: and delivering a complete informational environment to an AI model prior to token
9: generation. This methodology asserts that the quality of a model's output is less
10: dependent on the model's architecture itself and more on the richness of the context
